description_long: This is a weathered, yellow parking meter with a boxy upper section and a single, tapered mounting post. The front face features a display area with faded instructions, a postal or municipal logo, and visible graffiti and scratches. The sides and back are also covered in graffiti, with some stickers and additional markings, indicating heavy use in an urban environment. The meter is constructed primarily from metal, likely steel, with a painted finish that shows signs of wear and exposure to the elements. The mounting post is solid and connects directly to the ground, providing stability. No digital display or card interface is visible, suggesting an older, coin-operated model.
description: A weathered yellow metal parking meter with a boxy top, graffiti, and a sturdy tapered post. The front features a display area and logo, with no visible digital or card interface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the display area, logo, and most graffiti, with the coin/payment interface visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights extensive graffiti and the meter's boxy shape, with less detail on the payment area.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals faded paint, minor graffiti, and a sticker, with no visible interface or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view shows additional graffiti and the side profile of the meter, with the mounting post visible.
attribute_payment_interface: A coin payment slot is visible on the front face, with no card, contactless, or digital interface present. The interface area includes a display window and faded instructions.
attribute_coin_slot: Present on the front face, rectangular with a horizontal slit, located below the display area and above the logo.
attribute_mounting_post: A single, solid metal post, painted yellow, tapers downward and connects the main body to the ground.
